2026-06-02PSCorrections and Conditional Release ActReappointment of a full-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of CanadaReappointment of Micheline Beaubien of Montréal, Quebec, as a full-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of five years, effective June 26, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a full-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada
precis: Reappointment of Micheline Beaubien of Montréal, Quebec, as a full-time member of the Quebec Regional Division of the Parole Board of Canada, to hold office during good behaviour for a period of five years, effective June 26, 2026.
